name: Date Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Follow the operating instructions in your breadmaker manual for the chosen size of bread (1 pound or 1.5 pounds).
2. As soon as you press Start, set a separate timer for 15 minutes.
3. At the 15-minute mark, add the dates and nuts to the bread maker.
4. Continue with the rest of the instructions in your Regal Breadmaker manual.
